title: Letter dated 11 july 2017
text: Receipt No :161022/20 A 17/0/0 SECRETARY, WC sAUfffd TriW4 Rakesh Srivastava Secretary DO No. 13/3/2017-CVV-I- Part(1) Dear File No.CW-1-13/3/2017-CW-1-Part(1) 36 4TH Ct t i'.1) I Y. Rital 4T-0 14wR1 vn-R-41 4-4-9, 9-4 - 110001 Government of India Ministry of Women & Child Development Shastri Bhawan, New Delhi-110001 Website http://www ‘ivcd.nic.in Dated 11th July 2017 You would agree that children are the most valuable asset of our society. They are the future of the country which needs to be shaped with great care and sensitivity. 2 NCERT is doing very important job of inculcating the young minds of children in an excellent manner. Ministry of Women & Child Development also has been working to protect the interest of the children in the society and to ensure a safe environment and better future for them. 3 Though the Ministry has framed various important legislations to protect children's interest (JJ Act, 2015, POCSO 2012, child Marriage Act etc). It is observed that there is a gap between the intended benefits offered by these legislations and children. They often remain unaware of these rights and laws which can provide them protection. A child needs to be aware regarding the action to be taken by her/him to ensure protection of her/his rights, when under any kind of threat. 4 It is also felt that it is imperative to teach the young minds the concepts of gender parity, individual freedom and ethics to ensure that they grow into responsible adults and help creating a fair and just society in future. 5 In view of the forgoing, I would request you to kindly consider following proposals. i) The back side of NCERT course books for children should be used for advertising child helpline (1098), POCSO e-box, punishment due for child marriage etc. ii) There should be a chapter in Social science regarding the issues mentioned in pare 4 above. The narrative should continue till class 12th for having a reasonable impact on young minds. 6. Ministry of WCD can provide detailed inputs regarding the topics suggested above if required. We offer our full cooperation in the matter. With regards. Your Sincerely, (Rakesh Srivastava) Dr. Firushikesh Senapaty Director, NCERT V/5, NCERT Campus Sri Aurobindo Marg New Delhi — 110016 Shastri Elhawan, Dr. Rajender Prasad Road, New Delhi-110001 Tel. : 011-23383586 Fax : 011.23381495 E-mail : secy.wcd@nic.in Fi le No.CW -l-1 3l3l 2017 -CW-l-Part(1 ) 36 Receipt {o : 15A022120171O1O SECRETARY, qr#'qT {fiq}-{fre -i{ffir$ Rakesh $rlvastaw* $c*retary DO No. 131312017-CW-l- Part{1) Dear g^r, t*"^f*% , You would agree ihat chifdren are the most vsluable asset of our sociely, They ar* the future of the country which needs to be siraped wiih great care and sensitivity. 2 NCIRT is doing very impofiant job of inculcating the young minds of children in an excellent manner.
